About Us

We offer a wide range of investment opportunities to our wonderful investors across the globe and we also have our team of experts and specialist working 24hr/7 making investment easy for our investors, we also ensure 100% safety for our investors making us reliable and a trusted platform, because of these we are ranked among the best in the world.

All our investors cryptocurrency transactions take place on the publicly distributed blockchain ledger and then also in the GrandTrust account of our investors, making our company transparent and easy for our investors. Every transactions in the company is being tracked by the transaction ID allowing our investors to look up transaction data, including where, when, and how much of a cryptocurrency transaction that was carried out from a wallet address.

We offer investors diversification from traditional financial assets such as stocks and bonds. While there's limited history on the price action of the crypto markets relative to stocks or bonds, so far the prices appear uncorrelated with other markets. That can make them a good source of portfolio diversification.

GrandTrust investment is sponsored by Shell power which is the number one global lubricant supplier, delivering market-leading lubricants to consumers in over 100 countries, we also offer Renewable Electricity plans, you can take control of your choice in electricity to power your home.
